questionHtml: An air molecule is situated at point X in the pipe at t = 0. Describe the motion of this air molecule during one complete cycle of the standing wave beginning from t = 0.
markschemeHtml:
«air molecule» moves to the right and then back to the left ✔

returns to X/original position ✔

meta.title: An air molecule is situated at point X in the pipe at t = 0. Describe the motion of this air molecule during one complete cycle of the standing wave beginning from t = 0.
